final_verdict: Accepted with Caveats / Personal Runtime V1 Package Built; Local Execution Proof Requires User Environment

caveats.title: Local execution proof not performed on user Windows machine
No live fetch proof in final package
caveats.carry_forward: Current package is cache-first/dry-run. Credential/live refresh must be proven separately without sharing API key.

caveats.title: Single-provider source confidence only
caveats.carry_forward: Not source truth, validation, divergence check, or failover.

caveats.title: Calendar/event not in V1 scope
caveats.carry_forward: No official event risk or event-blocking logic exists in V1.

caveats.title: SPX/NQ out of active V1 scope
caveats.carry_forward: May appear only in future scope notes, not active panel/config.

caveats.title: Detailed row-level candidate store not reconstructed
caveats.carry_forward: Panel displays current counts/summary only until current row-level store is provided.

caveats.title: XAUUSD M5 absent from official RSP cache plan
caveats.carry_forward: Not fabricated; future provider/feed plan may add it explicitly.

caveats.title: Row/Matrix postures preserved
caveats.carry_forward: Row 2 retained unopened; Rows 6–7 deferred re-entry; matrix-complete ≠ matrix-open.
